items.caption:
A collage of three photographs related to the topic of illegal drug manufacturing, specifically methamphetamine labs. the top text provides a statement about the context of the images, suggesting that the presence of more than two empty bottles in the trash could indicate the operation of a meth lab. the bottom text is a hint that may or may not be related to the image content.

the first photo on the left shows a collection of various bottles, some of which appear to be chemicals or solvents commonly used in the production of methamphetamine. the second photo in the middle depicts a pile of what looks like discarded materials, possibly components or byproducts of a meth lab. the third photo on the right shows a bag filled with numerous small containers, which could be additional chemicals or precursors used in the manufacturing process.

the background of all three photos is nondescript, focusing the viewer's attention on the items and their potential association with illegal drug activity. the style of the image is informative, likely intended to educate or raise awareness about the signs of methamphetamine production.
